clickhouse:
SELECT
    nullIf(nullIf(events.`mat_$pathname`, ''), 'null') AS path,
    countIf(and(greaterOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_0)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_1)s)), lessOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_2)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_3)s)))) AS aff_cur,
    countIf(and(greaterOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_4)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_5)s)), lessOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_6)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_7)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_8)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_9)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_10)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_11)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_12)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_13)s)))) AS aff_prior
FROM
    events
WHERE
    and(equals(events.team_id, 275753), equals(events.event, %(hogql_val_14)s), isNotNull(nullIf(nullIf(events.`mat_$pathname`, ''), 'null')), greaterOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_15)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_16)s)), lessOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_17)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_18)s)))
GROUP BY
    path
ORDER BY
    plus(aff_cur, aff_prior) DESC
LIMIT 30 SETTINGS readonly=2, max_execution_time=10, max_threads=60, allow_experimental_object_type=1, max_ast_elements=4000000, max_expanded_ast_elements=4000000, max_bytes_before_external_group_by=0, enable_analyzer=1, transform_null_in=1, optimize_min_equality_disjunction_chain_length=4294967295, allow_experimental_join_condition=1, use_hive_partitioning=0
hogql:
SELECT
    properties.$pathname AS path,
    countIf(and(greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-29')), lessOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-05-12')))) AS aff_cur,
    countIf(and(greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-15')), lessOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-28')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-17')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-19')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-20')))) AS aff_prior
FROM
    events
WHERE
    and(equals(event, 'affiliate_link_click'), notEquals(properties.$pathname, NULL), greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-15')), lessOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-05-12')))
GROUP BY
    path
ORDER BY
    plus(aff_cur, aff_prior) DESC
LIMIT 30
